name: Orange Ginger Beef
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Thawed undiluted frozen Orange juice concentrate
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a wok or wide frying pan over high heat until hot.
2. Add vegetable oil, swirling to coat the sides.
3. Add ginger slices and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 5 seconds.
4. Add beef and stir-fry for 2 minutes or until just pink.
5. Add orange sauce and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
6. Add cornstarch solution and cook, stirring, until the sauce boils and thickens.
7. Garnish with orange slices.
